write a hello world java program\

Sure, here's a simple Hello World Java program:

```java
public class HelloWorld {
    public static void main(String[] args) {
        System.out.println("Hello, World!");
    }
}
```

To run the program, navigate to the directory where the file is saved, and compile the code by typing the following command into the terminal:

```
javac HelloWorld.java
```

This will generate a class file named "HelloWorld.class". To run the program, type the following command into the terminal:

```
java HelloWorld
```

This should output the message "Hello, World!" to the console.
